query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS menu_config (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  configJson TEXT NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX mc_user (userId)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ssBFmViK3wawX7.5ba43d803806 --database W4MM458SKqYRWRGGQrfw8A --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS menu_config (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  configJson TEXT NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX mc_user (userId)
);
